parameters.Description: 設備在電信機房內的正常長期運作環境

tests.Condition: Operate continuously at 5°C
Operate continuously at 40°C

parameters.Description: 模擬機房空調失效或極端氣候下的短期運作極限 (不超過 96 小時)

tests.Condition: Soak at -5°C, then power on and operate
Operate at 50°C for up to 96 hours

parameters.Description: 設備處於包裝狀態下的極端儲存與運輸環境

tests.Condition: Soak at -40°C for 72 hours
Soak at 70°C for 72 hours
Soak at 40°C and 93% RH for 96 hours

parameters.Description: 模擬包裝物在物流過程中的自由落體跌落 (高度依重量而定)
parameters.Sequence: Typically 1 bottom, 1 top, 2 sides, 2 ends, 1 corner, 1 edge (or similar profiling)

parameters.Description: 模擬設備拆箱後在機房內搬運、安裝進機架時的意外滑落
parameters.Test Condition: Equipment in typical un-packaged installation state

tests.Drop Height: 75 mm to 100 mm (depending on weight) or rotational edge drop

parameters.Description: NEBS 最著名的抗震測試：模擬強烈地震發生時，機架與設備的結構完整性與功能性
parameters.Waveform: Synthesized waveform matching the Required Response Spectrum (RRS)
parameters.Acceleration Level: Peak acceleration often around 4.4g to 5.0g (dependent on upper floor limits)

tests.Condition: 0.2g sine sweep from 1 to 50 Hz on each axis (X, Y, Z)
Apply Zone 4 waveform independently on each of 3 axes
No structural failure, no service interruption (or self-recovery)

parameters.Description: 模擬機房內空調系統、發電機或附近交通造成的長期低頻震動

tests.Condition: Apply specified profile (e.g., 0.1g acceleration limit at higher frequencies)

parameters.Description: 設備在不同海拔高度的正常運作環境溫度極限

tests.Condition: Operate at 40°C up to 1829m
Operate at 30°C from 1829m to 3960m

parameters.Description: 評估整機櫃設備在火災發生時的阻燃與火勢蔓延控制能力 (ATIS-0600319.2008)

tests.Condition: Ignite methane line burner within equipment
Fire shall not spread beyond the EUT confines
No visible smoke at 20 minutes

parameters.Description: 評估單一機箱/插槽設備的阻燃能力

tests.Condition: Apply burner; monitor thermal and physical spread
Flames extinguished by 15 minutes

parameters.Description: 模擬設備在包裝狀態下，經由卡車、鐵路、空運或海運時的隨機震動

tests.Condition: Apply specified low-level random vibration with transient peaks

parameters.Description: 模擬受控環境中的腐蝕性氣體 (10天測試模擬15年壽命)
parameters.Gas Concentrations: 10 ppb Cl2, 10 ppb H2S, 200 ppb NO2, 100 ppb SO2

tests.Condition: 10 days continuous exposure to mixed flowing gas
Verify operational functionality post-exposure

parameters.Description: 模擬戶外非氣密機櫃的嚴苛腐蝕環境
parameters.Gas Concentrations: 20 ppb Cl2, 100 ppb H2S, 200 ppb NO2, 200 ppb SO2

tests.Condition: 10 days continuous exposure to mixed flowing gas

parameters.Description: 測試電路板在吸濕性粉塵污染下的絕緣電阻下降情況 (GR-1274-CORE)

tests.Condition: Apply standard synthetic dust
Measure surface insulation resistance during high humidity

parameters.Description: 規範設備正常運作時的聲功率級上限，保障機房人員聽力

tests.Condition: Measure declared A-weighted sound power level at 27°C
Measure sound power level at maximum intended-design fan speed
